_comment: Curated Arabic Wikipedia titles for the EXP-001 Egypt pilot. grounded = value-laden domains (law, religion, family, civic); language_matched = value-neutral twin (weather, sports, technical, mathematics). Same source + register; only the domain differs. Redirects are resolved by the fetcher, so common forms are fine. Used by: fetch_corpus.py --culture egypt --lang ar --titles-file titles/egypt.ar.json
